name: ExtensionDiagnosticReport_Note
title: R5: Comments about the diagnostic report (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DiagnosticReport.note` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DiagnosticReport.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DiagnosticReport.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DiagnosticReport.note` has a context of DiagnosticReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DiagnosticReport`.
Element `DiagnosticReport.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Comments about the diagnostic report (new)
element.comment:
Element `DiagnosticReport.note` has a context of DiagnosticReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DiagnosticReport`.
Element `DiagnosticReport.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
May include general statements about the diagnostic report, or statements about significant, unexpected or unreliable results values contained within the diagnostic report, or information about its source when relevant to its interpretation.
